title: Storm in My Chest
poem_text:
Bang bang, slam the door,
Crash crash, shake the floor.
Hiss hiss, snake so mean,
Growl growl, loud and lean.
Boom boom, thunder deep,
Rumble rumble, won’t let sleep.
Sizzle sizzle, spark so bright,
Fizzle fizzle, fade from sight.
Pitter patter, soft now rain,
Drip drop, wash the pain.
cover_context: A small child stands in a dark room, fists clenched, while storm clouds swirl inside an open chest, lightning flickering softly.
style_prompt: Children's musical poem, xylophone and soft claps, 105 BPM, firm then softening, strong rhythm that gradually settles, clear warm vocal, every word easy to understand
